factorySheathFlaw: Stock injection-molded plastic sheath is bulky, rattles loudly in the brush, and lacks reliable multi-position belt carry options.
idealLeatherWeight: 8-9 oz vegetable-tanned leather with a thick welt
optimalCarryStyle: Vertical deep-woods belt loop or compact scout carry

factorySheathFlaw: Comes with a rigid Kydex sheath that can dull the cryo-treated edge over time if dirt/grit gets trapped inside the hard shell.
idealLeatherWeight: 7-8 oz lightweight vegetable-tanned to match the 3.6 oz skeletonized tang
optimalCarryStyle: Slim, high-ride hip sheath to maintain a low-profile backcountry footprint

factorySheathFlaw: Standard metal pocket clip scratches surfaces and creates a noticeable pocket bulge; lacks a dedicated, silent belt-slip option for tactical or formal wear.
optimalCarryStyle: Pancake-style low-profile belt slip or an angled quick-draw open pouch

factorySheathFlaw: The wide G10 handle and large signature thumb hole tear up pocket edges over time; pocket clip carry exposes the knife to snags in heavy brush.
optimalCarryStyle: Vertical open-top friction-fit sheath or a secure snap-flap field pouch

factorySheathFlaw: The included woven nylon holster easily frays at the belt seam under hard use, lacks drainage, and sags when saturated with mud or water.
idealLeatherWeight: 9-10 oz heavy-duty oiled skirting leather with a solid reinforcement welt
optimalCarryStyle: Rigid side-draw belt scabbard with integrated water-drainage brass eyelet

factorySheathFlaw: The sharp serrated edge cutting teeth quickly shred thin stock cordura or vinyl holsters from the inside out, posing a puncture risk during heavy ground work.
idealLeatherWeight: 10-12 oz ultra-heavy saddle leather or dual-layered multi-welt build
optimalCarryStyle: Reinforced heavy side-draw sheath with a built-in Kydex inner lining guard
